spoilers.text: I’m saying this because the spoilers themselves are going to disappoint people, but the chapter itself will actually be better. That’s why I’m issuing a clear warning: you should wait for the full chapter before passing judgment. I can’t really say anything more than that.

spoilers.text: #ONEPIECE1184 This might be a chapter where you just skip straight to the scanlation and skip the spoilers (though not because it’s so damn good). Might be better, a chapter where the chapter itself is more important,there’s no point in starting to post hints or anything, sorry.

misc.text: #ONEPIECE1183 I’m probably one of the few people who are genuinely interested in Brook’s backstory and Gunko’s past. However, I can understand the criticism from users who feel that the flashback appears far too late, perhaps it should have come even before the Loki flashback.

misc.text: Candelle could be doing the same thing Garling did at God Valley. After gaining influence in the kingdom, she may have recommended Esperia for the next hunting games to the Gorosei, and after it ended, took Gunko to Marijoa and turned her into a Holy Knight? #ONEPIECE1183
